case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS TOWNSEND, MARK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,704.66 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
